meta.description: Agent-editable parameter manifest — overwrites to best-so-far each accepted iteration
rules: Agent may only modify 'current' values within declared min/max bounds
Agent must not add, remove, or rename parameters
Agent must not change min, max, step, or mutable fields

lookback_bars.description: Bars of price history analysed. Lower = more reactive to recent structure

pivot_window.description: Bars on each side of a swing point for pivot detection. Lower = more swing points, more reactive
pivot_window.production_mapping: Replaces swing_sensitivity enum at harness level. Production values: low=3, medium=5, high=8

lookback_bars.description: Bars of price history analysed. Higher = smoother, more durable structure levels

pivot_window.description: Bars on each side of a swing point for pivot detection. Higher = fewer but more significant swings
pivot_window.production_mapping: Replaces swing_sensitivity enum at harness level. Production values: low=3, medium=5, high=8
